_meta.rule: AO reach = high-value candidate signal, NOT ownership proof. dentist_multi/stealth_dso need documentary corroboration. No DB writes. IL only. ready_for_validation != final; Codex gate validates+promotes.
_meta.qa_note: Row-level signal(=structural AO/mailing/EIN) vs evidence(=documentary URL/artifact). evidence_scope: AO documentary evidence is NETWORK-LEVEL (establishes owner/ownership-type for the group); per-location attachment rests on the federal AO signal unless address_exact_confirmed=true. Nothing here is final; _bridge.consolidate_ready is always false until QA approves. TERMINOLOGY: dentist_multi = non-independent/consolidated candidate (NOT 'corporate'); DSO/PE candidate = stealth_dso or branded_dso with documentary DSO/PE/MSO evidence (PE subset = Nittinger/Sonrava + Labinov/Destiny-ProSmile).

network_summaries.summary: Sohail Shafi is the NPPES authorized official (Office Manager) for 17 Chicagoland GP locations across 16 ZIPs. The actual owner/CEO is Dr. Reem Shafi, DMD, who publicly describes herself as "Owner and CEO of Two Rivers Dental — 20 locations in Chicago and one in California" (Illinois Tech Elevate bio). Sohail Shafi's LinkedIn lists him as "Office Manager – Two Rivers Dental," confirming his administrative role as AO rather than the clinical owner. The group operates under at least seven local brand names (Two Rivers Dental, Ashton Dental PC, Simply Dental, Troy Dental, Hanover Dental, Smile Town Dental, Oswego Dental, Ogden Valley Dental) with a shared mailing address at 1730 Park St #106, Naperville IL 60563. All branded-practice staff pages carry the boilerplate "All professionals at Two Rivers Dental maintain the highest levels of accreditation," confirming a single organizational identity. The "Gentle Dental Group" in Yorkville (location ad04ebea2ff68064) is a local brand name within this group — Dr. Reem Shafi is listed on its staff page and it shares the group mailing address — it is NOT the national Gentle Dental DSO; the existing dso_national classification appears to be a false positive. No private equity, MSO, or DSO-management evidence was found; this is a dentist-owned private multi-location group.

1st Family Dental is a dentist-founded, multi-location dental brand operating since 1996 across 15 Chicagoland watched-IL GP locations. The network operates under a unified public brand (1stfamilydental.com) listing all locations with shared leadership. Dr. Ghassan Abboud (President, Prosthodontist) leads the group. Vesna Belkic appears on NPPES records as General Manager / COO — an administrative officer signing NPI authorizations across the network, not the ownership principal. No PE backer, MSO, or DSO management company has been found in any source. The practice presents as dentist-led and privately held. Two locations (FIRST DENTAL IMAGE INC. and ARMITAGE PROFESSIONAL SERVICES) carry solo_established classifications with no 1st Family branding, making them structurally ambiguous within the cluster — they may be managed under the same umbrella or represent a stale/erroneous AO association.

Rachel Nittinger is a credentialing manager (Manager Credentialing) for Sonrava Health — a PE-backed DSO majority-owned by New Mountain Capital since 2012. She is NOT a dentist-owner; she is a corporate administrative officer whose name appears as authorized official across 12 Illinois professional-corporation NPIs that Sonrava uses as friendly-PC shells to operate DentalWorks offices in Chicagoland. The entity names ("ILLINOIS DENTAL PROVIDERS [location], LTD.", "MECKLER DENTAL PROVIDERS", "DCP OF ILLINOIS", etc.) are friendly PCs for the DentalWorks brand. Direct address matches confirmed via DentalWorks public locator (1320 American Ln Schaumburg, 4066 N Milwaukee Ave Irving Park, 130 S Franklin St Chicago Loop). Sonrava Health/DentalWorks is a national DSO with 580+ offices in 20+ states. 10 of 12 locations are already classified dso_national in the pipeline; 2 solo_established outliers (Arlington Heights, Plainfield) share the identical "ILLINOIS DENTAL PROVIDERS" naming pattern and same AO and are effectively the same network.

Fadi Aqel, DDS is the owner/principal of Brite Dental, P.C., a dentist-owned multi-location group operating 12 Chicago-area offices under the public brand "Brite Dental" (britedental.org). The BBB profile names him Owner; no PE, MSO, or management-services company appears in any source. Several NPPES records carry the affiliated_dso label "Dental 360" — Yelp and the Brite Dental website confirm "Dental 360" is a co-brand or trade name used at some locations (notably 6720 N Clark St) within the same owner network. Two locations use distinct trade names (Clinica Dental, 1st American Dental) but the britedental.org office list includes the identical addresses, confirming they are part of the Brite Dental group. AO reach of 12 across 9 ZIPs is fully explained by a single dentist-owner running a branded multi-location practice; no stealth-DSO or PE evidence found.

ProCare Dental Group P.C. is a dentist-founded, family-owned multi-location dental group built by Dr. Robert Brunetti (DDS Loyola, MBA Kellogg/Northwestern), who serves as President and CEO. The practice began as a single office in 1979 and has grown to 10 Chicagoland locations. All 9 watched-IL locations share the registered legal name "PROCARE DENTAL GROUP, P.C." The official website (procaredentalgroup.com) confirms the multi-location footprint and describes a family-owned group. No private equity, MSO, DSO management contract, or external investor evidence was found in any source. AO reach of 9 ZIPs is explained by Brunetti being the founding owner/officer across all entities, not a management intermediary. This is a classic dentist_multi: owner-operated private group, no PE backing.

Jubrail Sweis (a.k.a. Jay Sweis), DDS, is a licensed general dentist who graduated from University of Illinois Chicago College of Dentistry with over 10 years of practice. He appears as authorized official across 7 Chicagoland GP locations spanning 7 ZIP codes. His own professional corporation is "Jay Sweis DDS PC" which operates under multiple local brand names including "Advocate Dental" (Geneva, St. Charles), "Excellence Dental of Barrington," "Bloomingdale Dental," "Manhattan Dental," and "Jay Sweis D.D.S P.C" (Chicago/60639). He is also listed as an associate dentist at Advocate Dental of Palatine (Dr. George Skoog, founder), meaning his AO appearance on the Palatine Dental NPI (60067) likely reflects his associate/credentialing role there rather than ownership. Everyone's Family Dental (St. Charles and other IL cities) is connected to Sweis per multiple NPI aggregators. No PE, MSO, management agreement, or national DSO brand affiliation was found anywhere in the web record. This is a dentist-owned multi-location private group operating under various local trade names — classic dentist_multi structure. gate_status is candidate because, while his personal bio on ZocDoc and NPI aggregators confirms he operates multiple locations and owns Jay Sweis DDS PC, no single group website shows all locations together under one brand with documentary ownership attribution sufficient for ready_for_validation under the corroboration bar. Additionally, the Palatine location may reflect associate status, not ownership.

All 7 locations share the legal entity name "D2 DENTAL AT OAK STREET, P.C." — the friendly-PC operating wrapper for Destiny Dental, a Midwest DSO co-founded in 2010 by Boris Labinov (CFO) and Jim Lucci (President) under L2 Management, backed at founding by Dixon Midland Company (Chicago-based PE). Boris Labinov is a DSO executive/co-founder, not a solo practitioner. Destiny Dental was acquired by ProSmile Holdings LLC on August 30, 2024; ProSmile is backed by TriSpan, a middle-market PE firm. This is a confirmed stealth-DSO / friendly-PC network: the practices operate under the "D2 Dental at Oak Street, P.C." professional-corporation name across 7 Chicagoland ZIPs while being managed by L2 Management and, post-2024, folded into the PE-backed ProSmile platform. All 7 locations should be reclassified from solo_established to dso_national (ProSmile/Destiny Dental) or dso_regional pending confirmation of which specific addresses map to the current Destiny/ProSmile footprint.

Dr. Ahmed Ramaha, DDS (University of Illinois at Chicago, 2002–2006) is the Founder and CEO of Universal Dental Clinics, a dentist-owned multi-location Chicagoland group operating under the public brand udclinics.com. The official website lists 8 locations, of which at least 4 directly match NPPES cluster addresses (Elgin 229 National St, Orland Park 8752 W 159th St, Orland Park 10 Orland Square Dr, and a Burbank/Oak Lawn corporate office at 9618 Southwest Hwy corresponding to the Central Amazing Dental entity at 5501 W 79th St). Two cluster locations — STONE PARK DENTAL INC (1550 N Mannheim Rd, 60165) and LOOP DENTAL & SPA (1605 S Michigan Ave, 60616) — appear in the NPPES record but not on the current website, suggesting they may be older, closed, or rebranded offices still federally registered under Ramaha as AO. Legal entity names vary ("Amazing Dental LLC," "Universal Dental," "Stone Park Dental Inc.") but all share one AO and the public group brand. No private equity, MSO, or DSO management evidence was found in any source. This is a dentist-owned private group, not PE-backed.
